info.name: HMarketplace E-commerce API Suite
info.description: Comprehensive Postman collection for Hindustaan Marketplace (HMarketplace) backend testing, covering Health Checks, Authentication, Users, Sellers, Addresses, Products, Categories, Product Images, Product Variants, Reviews & QA, Shipping Profiles, Depots/Stores, Cart, Coupons, Orders, and Outgoing Webhooks.

request.description: Checks the health status of the API server and database connection.

item.name: Authentication & Users

request.description: Registers a new user (customer, seller, or admin) with optional profile avatar.
Authenticates user and initiates secure cookie session.
Returns current logged in user details from session cookie.
Retrieves details of a specific user by their unique database object ID.
Admin only endpoint to fetch list of all registered platform user records.
Updates current logged in user details.
Modifies user role or active state (Admin only).
Removes own user profile/deactivates session.
Performs hard deletion of targeted user profile (Admin only).
Clears user session cookie.

item.description: User registration, login, logout, and self management.

item.name: Sellers

request.description: Performs coordinated registration for a seller, creating both User and Seller profiles.
Retrieves the active seller profile details.
Admin only endpoint to list all platform sellers.
Retrieves public details of a seller by their ID.
Updates business metadata for the logged in seller.
Approves or rejects a merchant application (Admin only).
Deletes own seller business profile.
Deletes targeted seller profile (Admin only).

item.description: Seller registration, retrieval, and profile management.

body.raw:
{
  "fullName": "Jane Doe",
  "phone": "+919876543210",
  "line1": "Flat 402, Hindustaan Residency",
  "line2": "Sector 6",
  "landmark": "Near Central Park",
  "city": "Bengaluru",
  "state": "Karnataka",
  "country": "India",
  "pincode": "560001",
  "isDefault": true
}

request.description: Saves a new shipping address. Cascades to clear other defaults if marked default.
Lists all shipping addresses for the logged-in customer.
Fetches a specific shipping address by ID.

body.raw:
{
  "fullName": "Jane Updated Doe",
  "phone": "+919876543210",
  "line1": "Penthouse B, Hindustaan Residency",
  "line2": "Sector 6",
  "landmark": "Near Central Park",
  "city": "Bengaluru",
  "state": "Karnataka",
  "country": "India",
  "pincode": "560001",
  "isDefault": true
}

request.description: Updates a shipping address.
Removes a shipping address.

item.name: Products & Categories

request.description: Creates a new category for products (admin only).
Retrieves list of all active categories (public).

body.raw:
{
  "categoryId": "CATEGORY_ID_HERE",
  "title": "Flagship Phone Pro",
  "shortDescription": "Best in class smartphone.",
  "longDescription": "Powerful high performance smartphone with 108MP camera.",
  "brandId": "BRAND_ID_HERE",
  "highlights": ["108MP Camera", "5G Enabled", "8GB RAM"],
  "searchKeywords": ["mobile", "phone", "tech"]
}

request.description: Registers a new master product in the catalog (seller only).
Retrieves paginated and filtered list of active catalog products.
Retrieves full product details including variants, photos, and active listings by slug.
Updates core master catalog product entries.
Performs cascading deletions on catalog product, listings, variants, media, inventories, and pricing histories.

item.description: Product categories administration and core catalog manager.

item.name: Product Images

request.description: Uploads up to 10 product gallery photos to Cloudinary/local fallback (seller only).
Deletes specific variant media link.

item.description: Product media catalog uploads and removals.

request.description: Creates a sub variant under the master catalog product, provisioning seller listings, initial pricing profiles, and inventories automatically.
Updates variant attribute entries, pricing configurations, and inventories.
Deletes the variant and cascades to clean up all seller listings, listing inventories, and listing pricing history.

item.name: Reviews & Product Q&A

request.description: Submits a review for the product. Triggers background aggregation to recalculate product average rating.
Retrieves all approved reviews for a product, alongside their attached photo/video assets.
Posts a public customer question on the product thread.
Lists all public questions posted on the product.
Replies to a product question. Automatically flags as seller response if answered by product owner.
Lists all answers posted to a question, sorted by helpful votes.

item.description: Fulfillment customer reviews and community Q&A.

item.name: Shipping & Seller Stores

request.description: Registers a shipping profile detailing processing timelines and base charge tiers (Seller only).
Lists all shipping profile tiers configured by the seller.
Registers a physical logistics warehouse depot with GeoJSON coordinates (Seller only).
Lists all geolocated warehouse stores owned by the seller.

item.description: Merchant fulfillment logistics, shipping tiers, and warehouses.

request.description: Retrieves current user's active shopping cart and populates price metrics.
Syncs the user local cart items to the database state with inventory validation.
Applies a campaign coupon code to the shopping cart, validating order margins.
Removes any active coupon discount from the cart.
Wipes all items and active discounts inside the cart.

item.name: Coupon Campaigns

request.description: Configures a new marketing coupon code with category or product restrictions (Seller only).
Lists all campaigns designed by the seller.
Verifies if a code is valid for general checkout rules.
Removes/terminates a coupon campaign.

item.description: Seller campaign configurations and customer checks.

item.name: Order Processing

request.description: Transitions cart items to transactional order lines, decrements inventory stock, applies coupons, and clears cart.
Lists all orders placed by the customer.
Lists all orders containing listings owned by the merchant (Seller only).
Fetches a specific order detailing address snapshots and items.
Cancels a pending order, performing automated catalog inventory restock.
Updates order shipping status along the dispatch pipeline.

item.description: Fulfillment pipeline tracking, checkout conversion, and cancellations.

request.description: Subscribes a secure HTTP webhook receiver url to real-time e-commerce notifications.
Lists all registered active webhook subscriptions.
Deletes specific webhook receiver.
